commands.name: reset
commands.description:
🧹 Reset all bkcli settings and remove the local license file. 
Use this if you're starting over.

commands.name: register

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key from your account

commands.description:
🔑 Register your license using an API key from your Blazor For 
Kids account.

commands.name: trycheck
commands.description:
🔄 Check if your license is still valid. If offline, it skips 
errors. This runs automatically when opening solutions.

commands.name: check
commands.description:
✅ Force-check your license with the server and refresh it if 
needed. Requires internet.

commands.name: update
commands.description:
📦 Download and install the latest Blazor For Kids packages 
allowed by your license.

commands.name: upgrade
commands.description:
🧑‍💻 Upgrades your Blazor For Kids SDK to the latest version in
current project. Run this command from the root of your solution to ensure all 
projects are updated correctly. Future updates may include automatic fixes for 
breaking changes.

commands.name: version
commands.description: 📌 Show the current version of the bkcli tool.

commands.name: info
commands.description:
📘 Show beginner-friendly info about what bkcli does and how to
use it.

commands.name: copy-license

options.name: --path
options.description:
Path where the LicenseInfo.cs file should be 
created.

commands.description:
🔒 Copy license file to Blazor for Kids projects (internal use 
only)

commands.name: repair-license
commands.description:
🛠  Repairs the embedded license file. Run this command from 
the root of your solution to ensure all license files are properly updated. 
After running, restart your IDE to reload the project.
